---
name: Feature / User Story
about: Use this template for feature requests and user stories
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: []
---

## Feature / User Story
**Summary:** [Component] Short, imperative description

**Background**
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

**Scope**
What is included and explicitly what is NOT included.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [outcome]
- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [outcome]
- [ ] API contract documented / updated in OpenAPI spec
- [ ] Error cases handled and returning correct HTTP status codes

**Technical Notes**
- Relevant architecture decisions, constraints, or dependencies
- Downstream services or consumers affected

**Out of Scope**
- Items explicitly deferred to a follow-up ticket
